flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Eastern New Mexico University-Main Campus fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Eastern New Mexico University-Main Campus rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (21.4% → 25.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Eastern New Mexico University-Main Campus rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9k → 3.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Eastern New Mexico University-Main Campus rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (39.9% → 45.1%).
